narrative:
Canal Win-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 339 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.8 percentage points.
